title: Design a production architecture
prompt: Design a production-ready architecture for a mobile-first AI coding cockpit with local daemon, hosted dashboard, pairing, and multi-agent routing. Include failure paths, rollback plan, and observability.

title: Fix an intermittent bug
prompt: Users report intermittent pairing failure after scanning QR. Give root-cause hypotheses, a deterministic debug plan, and specific code-level fixes with validation steps.

title: Refactor a large module
prompt: Refactor a 3000-line orchestration file into maintainable modules without behavior regressions. Provide target file boundaries, API contracts, and migration sequence.

title: Harden CI/CD
prompt: Create a release-safe CI/CD workflow for a monorepo with dashboard and daemon, including pre-deploy smoke tests, docs link checks, and rollback guidance.

title: Security hardening
prompt: Perform a threat model for websocket auth, pairing codes, and command execution. Return top 10 risks with concrete mitigations and priority order.

title: Hackathon to product plan
prompt: Turn a hackathon prototype into a market-ready product in 7 days. Provide parallel streams, owner checklists, quality gates, and launch risk controls.

title: Supabase schema review
prompt: Review a Supabase schema for missing foreign keys and data retention gaps. Propose SQL migrations to improve referential integrity and cleanup strategy.

title: Mobile layout fixes
prompt: Fix mobile z-index and overflow regressions across header menus, command palette, toasts, and modals. Provide CSS layering conventions and regression test cases.

title: Explain model selection
prompt: Given a complex prompt, justify exactly why agent A should be selected over agents B and C. Include scoring dimensions and confidence margins.

title: PS to shipped output
prompt: Given a web hackathon problem statement, create an end-to-end output: architecture, MVP scope, implementation tasks, pitch narrative, and validation plan.
